2603.20975.title: DiscoUQ: Structured Disagreement Analysis for Uncertainty Quantification in LLM Agent Ensembles
2603.20975.paper_summary: Multi-agent LLM systems, where multiple prompted instances of a language model independently answer questions, are increasingly used for complex reasoning tasks. However, existing methods for quantifying the uncertainty of their collective outputs rely on shallow voting statistics that discard the rich semantic information in agents' reasoning. We introduce DiscoUQ, a framework that extracts and leverages the structure of inter-agent disagreement -- both linguistic properties (evidence overlap, argument strength, divergence depth) and embedding geometry (cluster distances, dispersion, cohesion) -- to produce well-calibrated confidence estimates. We propose three methods of increasing complexity: DiscoUQ-LLM (logistic regression on LLM-extracted structure features), DiscoUQ-Embed (logistic regression on embedding geometry), and DiscoUQ-Learn (a neural network combining all features). Evaluated on four diverse benchmarks (StrategyQA, MMLU, TruthfulQA, ARC-Challenge) with a 5-agent system using Qwen3.5-27B, DiscoUQ-LLM achieves an average AUROC of 0.802, outperforming the best baseline (LLM Aggregator, 0.791) while being substantially better calibrated (ECE 0.036 vs. 0.098). The learned features generalize across benchmarks with near-zero performance degradation and provide the largest improvements where they are most needed: in the ambiguous "weak disagreement" tier where simple vote counting fails.
2603.20975.paper_summary_zh: 多代理 LLM 系統，其中多個提示實例的語言模型獨立回答問題，越來越多地用於複雜推理任務。<lb/>然而，現有的量化其集體輸出不確定性的方法依賴於淺層投票統計，這些統計忽略了代理推理中的豐富語義信息。<lb/>我們介紹了 DiscoUQ，一個提取並利用代理之間不一致結構的框架——包括語言特性（證據重疊、論點強度、分歧深度）和嵌入幾何（聚類距離、分散度、凝聚力）——以產生良好校準的信心估計。<lb/>我們提出了三種複雜性逐漸增加的方法：DiscoUQ-LLM（基於 LLM 提取的結構特徵的邏輯回歸）、DiscoUQ-Embed（基於嵌入幾何的邏輯回歸）和 DiscoUQ-Learn（結合所有特徵的神經網絡）。<lb/>在四個多樣的基準（StrategyQA、MMLU、TruthfulQA、ARC-Challenge）上進行評估，使用 Qwen3.5-27B 的 5 代理系統，DiscoUQ-LLM 的平均 AUROC 達到 0.802，超過了最佳基線（LLM Aggregator，0.791），同時校準效果顯著更好（ECE 0.036 對比 0.098）。<lb/>學習到的特徵在基準之間具有良好的泛化能力，幾乎沒有性能下降，並在最需要的地方提供了最大的改進：在簡單投票計數失敗的模糊「弱不一致」層級。
2603.20975.author: Bo Jiang et.al.
